title: BAM (Background Activity Moderator)
overview: Background Activity Moderator (BAM) is a Windows feature introduced in Windows 10. It monitors background application activity, which can be useful during forensic investigations.

study.overview: Background Activity Moderator (BAM) is a Windows feature introduced in Windows 10. It monitors background application activity, which can be useful during forensic investigations.
